Class RecurveBow

java.lang.Object
nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
nongui.baseentity.ActionCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ItemCard
nongui.baseentity.cards.Itemcard.ClassChangingItemCard
nongui.listofcards.itemcard.ChangeClass.RecurveBow
public class RecurveBow extends ClassChangingItemCard
Represents the "Recurve Bow" Item Card.

Tightly strung and ready to whistle through the air. Change class to Marksman.
